name: Spring Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Mixed green and yellow beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Top and tail the mixed green and yellow beans.
2. Cook the beans in lightly salted boiling water for 3 to 5 minutes or until tender crisp. Drain and refresh under cold running water.
3. Add potatoes to boiling salted water, cook gently for 15 minutes or until tender. Drain.
4. Peel and chop the carrots. Salt lightly, then place them in a saucepan with enough cold water to cover. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender. Drain.
5. Cook the corn and peas in small amounts of lightly salted boiling water for 3 to 5 minutes, or until tender. Drain.
6. Peel and seed the tomatoes, then cut into small dice.
7. Dressing: In a bowl, whisk together egg yolks, Dijon mustard, salt, and freshly ground pepper. Gradually add sunflower oil drop by drop, beating well. When the mixture begins to thicken, thin with 1/2 teaspoon lemon juice.
8. Continue adding sunflower oil in a slow, steady stream until the desired thickness is reached. Add remaining oil as needed, adjusting seasoning with salt and pepper if necessary. Stir in shallots, honey, mint, and parsley.
9. Arrange the vegetables on one large platter or individual plates. Garnish with egg wedges. Drizzle any leftover dressing over the salad. Leftover dressing can be refrigerated for up to 1 week.
